title: SS Progression Week 3
purpose: Week 3: longer intervals at higher intensity

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 0% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% through. Low intensity, high volume. Building the engine from ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the base. 10:24 at 65%. This is where champions are made.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 0 minutes of endurance. The pace where you question if you're working hard enough. (You are.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 91% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 16:00 at 91%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 91% for 16:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 16:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 16:00 at 91%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/5. 5:36 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 33% complete. Rep 2/5. 55% at 85-100 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 5:36. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/5. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 2/5. 55% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 3/5. 16:00 at 91%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 3 of 5. Target: 91% FTP, 85-100 rpm. 2 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/5. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 3/5. 91% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 40% into session. 91%, 85-100 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 60% done. 1 intervals left. 26 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 4 of 5. Target: 55% FTP, 85-100 rpm. 1 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 60% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 60% done. 1 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 5/5. 67% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 91% × 16:00. Then 10min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 16:00 at 91%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 91% for 16:00. Then 10min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 91% × 16:00. Seated, 85-100 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 69 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 59min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 69 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 50% FTP × 10:24. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.
